name: Frosted Pumpkin-Walnut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add brown sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Stir in pumpkin and flavorings.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, and pumpkin pie spice.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, mixing well.
7. Stir in walnuts.
8. Drop dough by teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto greased cookie sheets.
9. Bake at 375°F for 12 minutes.
10. Cool on wire racks.
11. Frost with Maple frosting.
Yield: Approximately 7 1/2 dozen cookies (Maple frosting)
